title: elaeocarpus elatus
intro: Elaeocarpus elatus, also known as the Blue Bean Tree or Mountain Blue Bean Tree, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Australia and Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Elaeocarpus elatus is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its seeds are used to make a medicinal oil, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
